statement.markdown: Given a Trie and a key, remove the key from the Trie and return true if the key was present in the Trie, and false otherwise. Note that the key is deleted only if it is present and not used as a prefix for any of the other words.
statement.inputFormat: The input format will be: n, k0, k1, ..., kn-1
statement.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean value indicating whether the key was present or not
statement.notes: Use a Trie node with char, bool[26], and TrieNode pointers

examples.explanation: The key 'a' is present in the trie and will be deleted successfully
The key 'ab' is not present in the trie
